meta.title: FormHelp — AI-Powered Help for German Forms
meta.description: Upload PDF forms and get instant, easy-to-understand help filling them out — free and GDPR-compliant.

landing.heroDescription: Upload your document — our AI explains step by step what it says, what you need to do, and by when. Available in 16 languages.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: No expertise needed. No account. Just upload and understand.
landing.step1Text: Upload your official letter, notice, or application as a PDF. Maximum 10 MB — no form needs more.
landing.step2Text: Our AI reads the document and explains each section in plain language: What does it mean? What do you need to do? Are there deadlines?
landing.step3Text: Read the explanation in your language. Still have questions? The chat answers them instantly — clearly and patiently.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.feature1Text: Each form field is explained individually: What goes in? What format? Is it required? With example entries so you can fill it in with confidence.
landing.feature2Text: The AI detects all deadlines and dates in your document — so you never miss anything.
landing.feature3Text: Ask any question about your document. The AI answers instantly, clearly, and in your language.
landing.feature4Text: The complete analysis is translated into 16 languages — not by machine, but by AI that understands the context.
landing.testimonialQuote: I received a letter from the immigration office and was afraid of missing something important. With FormHelp, I understood in 2 minutes what I needed to do — and the deadline was in 10 days. Without this tool, I would have missed it.
landing.testimonialAuthor: Elif K., Hannover — Residence permit renewal
landing.languagesTitle: Understand your mail — in your language
landing.languagesSubtitle: The AI doesn't just translate words — it explains the context. So you truly understand what's meant.
landing.dsgvoPoint1: Documents are only used for analysis and are not permanently stored
landing.dsgvoPoint2: No registration, no tracking, no sharing with third parties
landing.bottomCtaTitle: Your next official letter doesn't have to be a mystery.
landing.bottomCtaText: Upload your document now and understand in minutes what it says.

home.heading: FormHelp
home.subheading: Upload a PDF form and get help filling it out.
home.dropHint: Drag a file here or click to select
home.errorTooLarge: The file must not exceed 10 MB.

form.fieldsSuccessText: Read the help texts carefully before filling out the form. Required fields are marked with *.

analyze.title: AI analysis available
analyze.description: Our AI automatically detects all form fields and creates understandable help texts — so you know what goes in each field.
analyze.privacyText: The uploaded PDF file will be sent to the AI service Anthropic (Claude) for analysis. Anthropic processes data on servers in the USA. Data is not used for training purposes and is not stored after processing. More information in our
analyze.consentLabel: I consent to the processing of my data by the AI service.
analyze.consentError: Please confirm consent to data processing before starting the analysis.
analyze.errorConnection: Connection to server failed. Please try again.

document.noDeadlines: No deadlines found in the document.
document.successText: Read the summary and next steps carefully. Pay special attention to any mentioned deadlines.

translate.translateInfo: The analysis was created in a different language. Click here to translate it to your language.
translate.translateError: An error occurred during translation. Please try again.

formWizard.downloadError: An error occurred while creating the PDF.
formWizard.downloadNoAnswers: Please fill in at least one field first.
formWizard.requiredHint: Fields marked with * are required. Click ? for an explanation.

fillForm.successMessage: Form successfully filled out and downloaded!
fillForm.errorGeneric: An error occurred while filling out the form. Please try again.
fillForm.errorNoChat: Please go through the form in the chat first before downloading it.
fillForm.errorNoFields: This PDF does not contain any fillable fields and cannot be filled out automatically.

cookie.text: We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience on our website. More information in our

footer.description: A free tool for anyone who wants to understand German bureaucracy.

chat.title: Questions about the document
chat.placeholder: Ask a question about this document…
chat.empty: Ask a question and get an understandable answer about your document.
chat.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
chat.errorNetwork: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
chat.errorTooLong: The message may not exceed 2000 characters.
chat.consentNote: Your question will be sent to the AI service for processing.
